use_cases: Rich text editors requiring quick access to formatting controls like bold, italic, and alignment
Document creation tools where users need to style and structure text content
Note-taking and CMS applications with inline text editing capabilities
Chat and messaging interfaces with rich text formatting support
Content management dashboards needing accessible formatting toolbars
ai_summary: A reusable text formatting toolbar component featuring common editing controls including bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, heading, quote, link, highlighter, palette, and text alignment options. Built with framer-motion animations for smooth tooltip reveals and includes active state management for toggle buttons. Designed as a flexible input component for text editors, document creators, and content management systems.
